title: not only... but (also)...（連接詞組）

formulas.zh: 不僅A而且B；連接相同詞性的成分，強調B比A更重要

formulas.formula: Not only + 助動詞 + S + V..., but (also) + S + V...
formulas.zh: 置於句首時，主句採倒裝語序，強調句子的強烈對比

explanation: not only...but also用於連接具相同詞性的語法成分（名詞、動詞、形容詞等），強調兩項事物都成立且後者更重要。當置於句首時，主句必須倒裝，即助動詞提前至主詞之前。此句型常見於學測，用於強調複合訊息。注意：but also中的also可省略，but 必須保留；倒裝時需確認主詞與動詞時態一致；不能與單純的and混淆。

examples.eng: Not only did he finish the project, but he also exceeded all expectations.
examples.chi: 他不僅完成了這個專案，而且超越了所有人的期望。

examples.eng: This book is not only educational but also highly entertaining for readers.
examples.chi: 這本書不僅具教育意義，而且對讀者來說也相當有趣。

examples.eng: Not only does she speak English fluently, but she also masters three other languages.
examples.chi: 她不僅英文說得流利，而且還精通其他三種語言。

examples.eng: The program benefits not only the students but also the teachers and parents.
examples.chi: 這個計畫不僅造福學生，而且也造福教師和家長。

extension.tip: 句首倒裝時務必確認：(1)助動詞必須前置於主詞；(2)主詞後的動詞應使用原形（do/does/did）；(3)but also後的主詞若與前面不同，需重複或代詞指代。平時應將倒裝結構與原序結構相互轉換練習。

examples.test: ❌ Not only he finished the work, but he also helped others.
examples.result: → ✓ Not only did he finish the work, but he also helped others.（助動詞did必須前置）

examples.test: ❌ She is not only hardworking and also talented.
examples.result: → ✓ She is not only hardworking but also talented.（必須用but，不用and）

examples.test: ✓ Not only are the flowers beautiful, but they also bloom year-round.
examples.result: → 現在式倒裝，助動詞are前置，主詞flowers後接動詞原形

extension.note: 置句首倒裝：『助動詞提前，主詞隨後，動詞變原形』；平序連接則『名詞/形容詞/動詞對應，but也必須用』。

parts: she master Chinese, but she also speaks Japanese fluently.
exercises.sentence: Not only does she master Chinese, but she also speaks Japanese fluently.
exercises.translation: 她不僅掌握中文，而且還能流利地說日文。

parts: challenging but also rewarding for the team.
exercises.sentence: This project is not only challenging but also rewarding for the team.
exercises.translation: 這個專案不僅對團隊具挑戰性，而且也很有回報。

parts: the concert impressive, but it also raised awareness for charity.
exercises.sentence: Not only was the concert impressive, but it also raised awareness for charity.
exercises.translation: 音樂會不僅令人印象深刻，而且還為慈善事業提升了認知。

parts: The new policy benefits not only employees
exercises.sentence: The new policy benefits not only employees but also the company's reputation.
exercises.translation: 新政策不僅使員工受益，而且也提升了公司的聲譽。
